task.name: Fix createExpenseTransactionSchema refinement
task.action:
In `src/lib/validations/expense-transactions.ts`, replace the `.refine()` on `createExpenseTransactionSchema` with `.superRefine()` that emits separate Zod issues for each error case: - Non-installment missing date: path `["date"]`, message "Date is required" - Installment missing duration: path `["installmentDuration"]`, message "Duration is required for installment expenses" - Installment missing start date: path `["installmentStartDate"]`, message "Start date is required for installment expenses"
Do NOT change `ExpenseTransactionValidation`, `updateExpenseTransactionSchema`, `ExpenseTransactionInput`, or `UpdateExpenseTransactionInput`.
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no type errors. Write a unit test in `src/lib/validations/__tests__/expense-transactions.test.ts` that validates all four cases (non-installment missing date, installment missing duration, installment missing start date, valid submission for both paths). Run `npx vitest run src/lib/validations/__tests__/expense-transactions.test.ts`.

task.name: Add FormMessage + onTouched to expense transaction forms
task.action:
Update the following 3 files: - `src/components/forms/CreateExpenseTransactionSheet.tsx` (10 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/CreateExpenseTransactionDrawer.tsx` (10 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/EditExpenseDrawer.tsx` (10 FormItem blocks)
For each file: 1. Add `FormMessage` to the import from `../ui/form` (or `../../ui/form`). 2. Add `` as the last child inside every `` block, after `` or after wrapper components like `` / ``. 3. Add `mode: "onTouched"` to the `useForm()` options object.
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no type errors or JSX issues.

task.name: Add FormMessage + onTouched to income transaction forms
task.action:
Update the following 3 files: - `src/components/forms/CreateIncomeTransactionSheet.tsx` (7 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/CreateIncomeTransactionDrawer.tsx` (7 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/EditIncomeDrawer.tsx` (7 FormItem blocks, already has 1 FormMessage -- add to the other 6)
For each file: 1. Add `FormMessage` to the import if not already present. 2. Add `` inside every `` that does not already have one. 3. Add `mode: "onTouched"` to the `useForm()` options object.
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no type errors or JSX issues.

task.name: Add FormMessage + onTouched to transfer forms
task.action:
Update the following 3 files: - `src/components/forms/CreateTransferSheet.tsx` (8 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/CreateTransferDrawer.tsx` (9 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/EditTransferDrawer.tsx` (9 FormItem blocks)
For each file: 1. Add `FormMessage` to the import. 2. Add `` inside every ``. 3. Add `mode: "onTouched"` to the `useForm()` options object.
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no type errors or JSX issues.

task.name: Add FormMessage + onTouched to expense type forms
task.action:
Update the following 4 files: - `src/components/forms/CreateExpenseTypeSheet.tsx` (2 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/CreateExpenseTypeDrawer.tsx` (2 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/EditExpenseTypeSheet.tsx` (2 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/EditExpenseTypeDrawer.tsx` (2 FormItem blocks)
For each file: 1. Add `FormMessage` to the import. 2. Add `` inside every ``. 3. Add `mode: "onTouched"` to the `useForm()` options object.
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no type errors or JSX issues.

task.name: Add FormMessage + onTouched to income type forms
task.action:
Update the following 4 files: - `src/components/forms/CreateIncomeTypeSheet.tsx` (2 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/CreateIncomeTypeDrawer.tsx` (2 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/EditIncomeTypeSheet.tsx` (2 FormItem blocks) - `src/components/forms/EditIncomeTypeDrawer.tsx` (2 FormItem blocks)
For each file: 1. Add `FormMessage` to the import. 2. Add `` inside every ``. 3. Add `mode: "onTouched"` to the `useForm()` options object.
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no type errors or JSX issues.

task.name: Add FormMessage + onTouched to card and account forms
task.action:
Update the following files that need partial fixes or only the mode change: - `src/components/forms/EditCardSheet.tsx` (5 FormItem, 0 FormMessage -- add all 5) - `src/components/forms/CreateCardDrawer.tsx` (5 FormItem, 3 FormMessage -- add to the 2 missing)
And add `mode: "onTouched"` to ALL card and account forms (including those that already have full FormMessage coverage): - `src/components/forms/CreateAccountSheet.tsx` - `src/components/forms/CreateAccountDrawer.tsx` - `src/components/forms/CreateCardSheet.tsx` - `src/components/forms/CreateCardDrawer.tsx` - `src/components/forms/EditAccountSheet.tsx` - `src/components/forms/EditAccountDrawer.tsx` - `src/components/forms/EditCardSheet.tsx` - `src/components/forms/EditCardDrawer.tsx`
For each file: 1. Add `FormMessage` to the import if not present. 2. Add `` to any `` that does not already have one (skip checkbox-only FormItems like `includeInNetWorth`). 3. Add `mode: "onTouched"` to the `useForm()` options object.
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no type errors or JSX issues.

task.name: Add shake keyframe animation to global CSS
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no CSS parsing errors.

task.name: Create useShakeOnError hook
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm the hook compiles. Write a unit test in `src/hooks/__tests__/useShakeOnError.test.ts` that verifies the className is set and cleared correctly. Run `npx vitest run src/hooks/__tests__/useShakeOnError.test.ts`.

task.name: Apply useShakeOnError to all form submit buttons
task.action:
In all 26 form files in `src/components/forms/` (excluding `SetTargetDialog.tsx`): 1. Import `useShakeOnError` from `@/hooks/useShakeOnError`. 2. Call `const { shakeClassName } = useShakeOnError(form.formState);` inside the component. 3. Add the `shakeClassName` to the submit ``'s className using `cn()`: `className={cn("existing-classes", shakeClassName)}`
The `ref` from the hook is optional -- if the hook uses `useEffect` + className approach (not DOM manipulation), a ref is not needed. The Builder should choose the cleaner pattern.
task.verify: Run `npm run build` and `npm run lint` to confirm no errors.

task.name: Verify and fix scroll-to-error inside ScrollArea
task.action:
Test whether React Hook Form's default `shouldFocusError: true` scrolls to the first errored field inside Radix `ScrollArea` containers. The forms that use `ScrollArea` include: - CreateExpenseTransactionDrawer - CreateIncomeTransactionDrawer - CreateTransferDrawer - EditExpenseDrawer - EditTransferDrawer - EditIncomeDrawer - EditCardDrawer - CreateCardDrawer - CreateAccountDrawer - EditAccountDrawer
If scrolling does NOT work (the field gets focus but the ScrollArea does not scroll to show it), implement a fix by adding an `onError` handler to `form.handleSubmit()` that calls `scrollIntoView()` on the first errored field.
The fix should be applied as a reusable utility or inline pattern. The `onSubmit` form handler currently uses `form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)`. Change it to `form.handleSubmit(onSubmit, onError)` where `onError` scrolls to the first error:
```typescript const onError: SubmitErrorHandler = (errors) => { const firstKey = Object.keys(errors)[0]; if (firstKey) { const el = document.querySelector(`[name="${firstKey}"]`) ?? document.getElementById(`form-${firstKey}-form-item`); el?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' }); } }; ```
Only implement this if the default behavior is insufficient. If the default works, skip this and note it in the verification doc.
task.verify: Manual test: Open a drawer form with many fields (e.g., CreateExpenseTransactionDrawer). Scroll to the bottom of the form. Fill only the bottom fields. Submit. Confirm the form scrolls to the first errored field at the top. Run `npm run build` and `npm run lint`.

task.name: Full lint, build, and test pass
task.action: Run the full QA pipeline: 1. `npm run lint` -- fix any lint errors. 2. `npm run build` -- fix any build errors. 3. `npx vitest run` -- run all tests, fix any failures. 4. Spawn the QA pipeline agent on all new/changed files.
task.verify: All three commands pass with zero errors. QA pipeline returns green. Generate `docs/form-validation-ux-verification.md` with results.
